answers: Robotics = designing, building, and programming robots. Combines mechanics, electronics, and computer science.
Types: industrial (manufacturing), service (cleaning), medical (surgery), autonomous vehicles, drones, humanoid.
Learn robotics: start with Arduino or Raspberry Pi, build simple bots, learn programming (Python/C++), and add sensors.
Beginner path: learn electronics basics → program Arduino → build a line-following robot → add sensors → make it smarter.
